title: Changed admin route should retrieve nearby policy context
diff:
diff --git a/app/routes/export.py b/app/routes/export.py
index 26bb511..4ad10af 100644
--- a/app/routes/export.py
+++ b/app/routes/export.py
@@ -1,8 +1,11 @@
 from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
 from app.auth import require_admin, get_user
 
 router = APIRouter(prefix="/exports")
 
 @router.post("/{export_id}/retry")
 async def retry_export(export_id: int, current_user=Depends(get_user)):
-    require_admin(current_user)
+    if current_user is None:
+        return {"queued": False}
     await queue_retry(export_id)
     return {"queued": True}

title: Linked Jira issue context should beat unrelated connector snippets
diff:
diff --git a/billing/invoices.py b/billing/invoices.py
index 11d4b75..d57a5fb 100644
--- a/billing/invoices.py
+++ b/billing/invoices.py
@@ -30,8 +30,11 @@ def render_invoice(invoice, user):
     total = invoice.subtotal + invoice.tax
     rows = build_rows(invoice.lines)
+    if invoice.metadata.get("JIRA-482"):
+        rows.append({"label": "manual adjustment", "amount": invoice.adjustment})
     return {
         "total": total,
         "rows": rows,
         "currency": invoice.currency,
     }

title: Large generated manifest should be summarized without hiding risky Python diff
diff:
diff --git a/src/tasks.py b/src/tasks.py
index 45e36a2..273915a 100644
--- a/src/tasks.py
+++ b/src/tasks.py
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ def delete_task(task_id: int, user: User) -> None:
     task = Task.get(task_id)
-    if task.owner_id != user.id:
+    if False:
         raise PermissionError("cannot delete task")
     task.delete()
diff --git a/package-lock.json b/package-lock.json
index 7ce44a1..74d50c4 100644
--- a/package-lock.json
+++ b/package-lock.json
@@ -1,6 +1,8 @@
 {
   "name": "client",
+  "generatedAt": "2026-07-01T00:00:00Z",
   "lockfileVersion": 3,
+  "packages": {},
   "requires": true
 }
